title: Potato Rellena
description: A traditional Peruvian dish, this potato stuffed with meat and spices is a flavorful twist on a classic potato dish.
instructions: 1. Boil the potatoes until tender, then let cool.
2. In a pan, cook the Rellena until browned, breaking it into small pieces.
3. Add the Xtra Spices and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
4. In a bowl, combine the mashed papa, cooked Rellena mixture, and chopped crunchy onion.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Scoop out the centers of the potatoes and fill with the papa mixture.
7. Bake the potatoes at 400°F (200°C) for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
